title: AP KGBV – Teaching – 299 Posts

basic_details.job_title: AP KGBV Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 299 PGT, PET, Principal and CRT Posts
basic_details.short_information: AP KGBV has published the Teaching Recruitment 2026 notification to fillup 299 PGT, PET, Principal and CRT Posts. Apply online by June 05. Salary ₹26,759 -34,139. Check eligibility, age limit, selection process, important dates, and apply online link here.
basic_details.organization_name: Kasturba Gandhi Balika Vidyalayas (KGBVs) – Type III, across Andhra Pradesh
basic_details.post_name: Principal, Post Graduate Teacher (PGT), Contract Residential Teacher (CRT), Physical Education Teacher (PET)

application_fee.general_fee: Rs. 300/- (through Commissioner of School Education payment gateway)

selection_process: Merit-based (weightage marks from academic and professional qualifications)
Newly formed District (each district is a separate unit)
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only at http://kgbvrecruitment.apcfss.in. Offline applications and applications received after the closing date will not be entertained under any circumstances. Application fee of Rs. 300/- must be paid through the Commissioner of School Education payment gateway during online application. Candidates must upload all required documents without fail.
seo_tags: Andhra Pradesh Kasturba Gandhi Balika Vidyalaya Teaching Recruitment 2026
